notes: TCGplayer Authentication Center study, 8,000+ packs: normal V 12.77%, VMAX/VSTAR 3.47%, full-art V 2.13%, full-art trainer 1.08%, alt-art V 0.74% (all full/alt arts merged into ultra-rare), Trainer Gallery 12.58% (reverse slot), rainbow 1.28%, gold 0.76% — hit rate just under 32%. Radiant rate (4.88%) and rare-holo share (25.53%) from an independent 615-pack DigitalTQ sample, also used to split VMAX/VSTAR (VSTAR 2.65%, VMAX 0.82%). Residual mass on non-holo rare; reverse filler 50/50 common/uncommon. packSize excludes the basic Energy and code card. SWSH ETB contains 8 packs.
